Label: Nominal sample period
Interpretation: The 10 ms sample period supports treating timing noise as negligible.

Label: Replay count
Interpretation: Thirty-two replays define a targeted HIL subset for timing and agreement checks.

Label: Boundary groups
Interpretation: Sixteen boundary groups keep the sample from being too sparse.

Label: Sites
Interpretation: Both sites are represented to reduce single-site bias.

Label: Core controllers
Interpretation: Includes the three core controllers Upper bound Strong TTC and Stopping-distance.

Label: Boundary sides
Interpretation: Both boundary sides are sampled to support agreement checks.

Label: Share braking_lead
Interpretation: The difficult family is not underrepresented.

Label: Share lowmu_slow
Interpretation: The difficult cell is not underrepresented.

Label: Repeats / case
Interpretation: Four repeats per case are sufficient to observe bench variability.

Label: Overlap with CarSim matrix
Interpretation: The HIL subset is fully aligned with the CarSim executed-check matrix.
